eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 1:44 PM on AUG 1, 2019 Effective until 5:44 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS AN UPDATE TO AN AMBER ALERT.  THE MARIES COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT HAS ISSUED AN AMBER ALERT FOR A CHILD ABDUCTION THAT OCCURRED ON MARIES COUNTY ROAD 213 AT 1:40 P.M. ON AUGUST 1, 2019.  ABDUCTED WAS DOMINQUE SUMMERFORD, MALE, 8 TO 11 MONTHS OLD.  SUSPECT VEHICLE IS A BLACK GMC OR CHEVROLET FULL SIZED TRUCK WITH 4 TIRES IN THE BED OF THE TRUCK.  MAY DISPLAY AN UNKNOWN STATE DEALER PLATE OR A PERSONALIZED PLATE.  THE VEHICLE WAS LAST SEEN TOWARDS VIENNA.  SUSPECT IS BELIEVED TO BE A WHITE OR HISPANIC MALE, BLACK HAIR, BLACK BEARD, WEARING A T-SHIRT WITH A DRAGON ON IT AND ARMED WITH A BLACK HANDGUN.  ABDUCTED WAS DOMINQUE SUMMERFORD, MALE, 8 TO 11 MONTHS OLD.  ALSO ABDUCTED WAS AN ALLISON SUMMERFORD, 22 YEAR OLD WHITE FEMALE.  ANYONE SEEING THE VICTIMS, SUSPECT, OR VEHICLE OR ANYONE HAVING ANY INFORMATION RELATED TO THE ABDUCTION SHOULD IMMEDIATELY DIAL 911 TO CONTACT THE NEAREST LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCY OR CALL THE MARIES COUNTY SHERIFF�S DEPARTMENT. If you see the suspect or vehicle, or if you have any information, immediately dial 9 1 1 to contact the nearest law enforcement agency.
